name: BreezSdkSpark
summary: Swift bindings to the Breez Spark SDK
description: Local wrapper around the upstream 0.18.0 tag. The upstream BreezSdkSpark.podspec is frozen at spec.version = 0.11.0-dev2 since the 0.11.0 tag, which forces CocoaPods to pull a mismatched FFI binary. This podspec depends on our locally vendored breez_sdk_sparkFFI = 0.18.0 instead. Replace with the upstream pod once Breez fixes their podspec.
